summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CleverBakes Filipino bakery ordering platform. All core features working correctly including landing page, admin dashboard, order system, and tracking functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API authentication with admin/cleverbakes2025 credentials
All 15 Filipino bakery products seeded and displayed correctly
Products CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Order tracking functionality with status timeline
Landing page loads with product menu from API
Order modal with GCash receipt upload functionality
Error handling for invalid order numbers
Responsive UI elements and data-testid attributes
